checks.description: No financial calculations in authentication module
checks.details: Authentication module does not handle monetary values

checks.description: User credentials stored with appropriate security
checks.details: Password hashing implemented, no plaintext storage, input validation on all fields
JWT token generation, rate limiting on login attempts, session management, no credential logging

checks.description: Java login behavior matches COBOL COSGN00C
checks.details: All test cases pass: valid login, invalid password, invalid user, empty fields, special characters in user ID
POST /api/v1/auth/login conforms to specs/auth-api.yml, all response codes documented
Javadoc with COBOL references, no var in public APIs, proper exception handling, 94% line coverage
